decode.title: Genomi Dashboard (decode)
decode.start_when: The agent runs the /genomi decode kicker or otherwise needs to render the consolidated Genomi Dashboard HTML artifact from gathered panel evidence.

decode.render_dashboard.description: Render the Genomi Dashboard self-contained HTML artifact from supplied panel evidence. Active Genome Index approval required.

evidence.description: Dashboard panel evidence keyed by panel name. Missing panels render the 'Not gathered yet' placeholder.

overview.description: Active Genome Index summary: sampleId, genomeBuild, variantCount, genotypeQuality, meanDepth, genomeSource, parsedAt, sourceCoverage[].

variants.description: Clinically significant (P/LP-highlighted) variants shown in the top 'Clinically Significant' section: rsid, gene, zygosity, chrom, pos, ref, alt, clinvarSignificance, conditionShort, evidenceQuality.

pgx.description: Pharmacogenomics records: gene, diplotype, phenotype, impact (normal|reduced|increased|poor), drugs[].

risk.description: Polygenic risk scores: trait, score, percentile, ancestryAdjusted, overlap, sources.

nutrigenomics.description: Nutrigenomic markers: marker, gene, rsid, status, recommendation, evidenceTier.

journal.description: Journal entries: ts, kind (observation|hypothesis|decision|question), title, body, tags, evidenceLinks.

mode.description: 'full' rewrites the dashboard; 'update' merges supplied panels over the existing inlined evidence.

output.description: Optional override for the dashboard HTML path. Defaults to a transient path under the system temp dir: <tmp>/genomi-dashboards/<sample>/dashboard.html.

variants_all_source.description: Path to a ClinVar matches JSONL file (e.g. the clinvar.matches.jsonl written by clinvar.match_variants). Pass the file path here; the renderer reads and normalizes it server-side. Accepts both scan_candidates format ({variant, clinvar, genes}) and matches JSONL format ({sample_variant, clinvar}).
